ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: During the past 3 days, have you been to other rooms of your home besides the room where you sleep?
During the past 3 days, have you been to an area immediately outside your home such as your porch, deck or patio, hallway of an apartment building, or garage?
During the past 3 days, have you been to an area outside your home such as a yard, courtyard, driveway, or parking lot?
During the past 3 days, have you been to places in your immediate neighborhood, but beyond your own property or apartment building?
During the past 3 days, have you been to places outside your immediate neighborhood, but within your town or community?
During the past 3 days, have you been to places outside your immediate town or community?
During the past 3 days, have you been to places outside of your county?
During the past 3 days, have you been to places outside of your state/province?
During the past 3 days, have you been to places outside of your geographical region?

Notes: Sum of Yes responses on 9-item Life Space Questionnaire; -999=Missing
